arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Alphonso Davies working on the ball; Manuel Neuer, Kim Min-jae, Serge Gnabry all return to team training; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich captain Manuel Neuer returned to team training after working out individually indoors on Sunday: Serge Gnabry (illness) and Kim Min-jae (Achilles tendonitis) also returned to team training after sitting out Sunday, but João Palhinha is still down and out with the flu:

arts.ttl: The struggle was real: Bayern Munich’s Leroy Sané battled food poisoning before goal scoring effort in Werder Bremen tilt
arts.sum: Food poisoning is awful and can zap the life out of you, so it is not hard to imagine that Bayern Munich star Leroy Sané was feeling pretty awful heading into the Werder Bremen match after dealing with a bout of the ailment last week. Leroy Sané was struggling with food poisoning two days before the Werder Bremen game.

arts.ttl: Two additional games in the UCL too much? Bayern Munich defender Josip Stanišić weighs in
arts.sum: Despite not finishing in the top eight, Stanišić remains optimistic and sees the additional games as an opportunity rather than a burden. With players like Stanišić leading the way, Bayern Munich fans have every reason to look forward to the future with optimism.

arts.ttl: Celtic host Hibs in Scottish Cup quarter-finals
arts.sum: Scottish Cup holders Celtic will be at home to Hibernian in the quarter-finals of this season's competition.

arts.ttl: Celtic host Hibs in last eight of Scottish Cup
arts.sum: Scottish Cup holders Celtic will be at home to Hibernian in the quarter-finals of this season's competition.

arts.ttl: Why Adam Idah won't be getting shirty with Harry Kane as Celtic seek to slay Bayern
arts.sum: Adam Idah idolised Harry Kane as a young player - but he won't be getting shirty with the England striker as Celtic seek to slay Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daizen Maeda available for Celtic against Bayern Munich after successful appeal
arts.sum: Celtic have successfully appealed their two-match ban handed to Daizen Maeda for his red card against Young Boys which has now been rescinded to one, meaning that the Japanese attacker…

arts.ttl: Alistair Johnston admits he DID brand Celtic rival a 'little b****' as he reveals trash talk is axed for one match only
arts.sum: The Hearts ace lifted the lid at some of the Celtic star's sledging but he'll be keeping his mouth shut when Munich come to town

arts.ttl: Celtic full-back defends Hearts midfielder 'b****' swipe and reveals trash talk shock
arts.sum: Celtic right-back Alistair Johnston has insisted that his "b****" comment towards Hearts midfielder Blair Spittal last season was probably justified.

arts.ttl: Celtic issue stern pyro warning ahead of Bayern Munich Champions League clash
arts.sum: Celtic have warned supporters not to bring any form of pyrotechnics to Parkhead for Wednesday night’s Champions League tie with Bayern Munich.
